chapters.title: ENGLISH TRANSLATION.
chapters.content_preview: ENGLISH TRANSLATION.  ooo  Stanza I.  I invoke the help of that Glorious Light which repre- sents the sum total of the knowledge of Brahmopanishads

chapters.title: Stanza I.
chapters.content_preview: Stanza I.  I invoke the help of that Glorious Light which repre- sents the sum total of the knowledge of Brahmopanishads whom we call Saraswathi, the exalted spouse of Brahma, who holds the Veena (lute), and who is most beautiful (all perfect):

chapters.title: Srayza II.
chapters.content_preview: Srayza II.  I shall try to explain the most important principles of astrology in an intelligible manuer and I shall be guided in the compilation of my present book by, the works of the re- nowned Maharishi Parasara. ,  _ NOTES,

chapters.title: NOTES,
chapters.content_preview: _ NOTES,  The author Venkatesa Pundit does not pretend to give the readers any original information on astrology.” He frankly tells us the source from which he draws his knowledge _ and he commands respect not for  . the original matter he puts before his readers, but for the ori

chapters.title: Rey o lL
chapters.content_preview: Rey o lL  a al Stanza IIT,  By referring to ordinary works the student can learn the details of the Jataka Bhaga, but I am going to expound

chapters.title: Stanza IIT,
chapters.content_preview: Stanza IIT,  By referring to ordinary works the student can learn the details of the Jataka Bhaga, but I am going to expound in my works principles of astrology which would help the intelligent student in his progress in the astrological studies,

chapters.title: Stanza IV.
chapters.content_preview: Stanza IV.  All the planets aspect the 7th house. Saturn, Jupiter, and Mars, (Sani, Guru and Kuja) have a special vision. Saturn aspects 3rd and 10th houses better, Jupiter 5th and 9th houses, and Mars 4th and 8th houses,  NOTES.

chapters.title: Stanza V,
chapters.content_preview: Stanza V,  Lords of the 5th and 9th houses are always good, while lords of the 3rd, 6th and 11th are always evil. ‘ NOTES.  The counting of the planets must always be from the birth time or lagna, Ravi owns Simha, Chundra owns Kataka, Buda owns

chapters.title: RTA AA THT TATU
chapters.content_preview: RTA AA THT TATU  ‘Stanza VI  When Benefics own quadrants they produce evil. When Malefics own quadrants they produce good; the good and evil planets become more and more powerful as they are lords of ' Ist, 4th, 7th, or 10th, houses ; 5th

chapters.title: Stanza VIII
chapters.content_preview: Stanza VIII-  Lord of the 8th house produces evil because he owns the 12th house from the 9th, which is the house of Bhagya (wealth). If he chances to be the lord of 1st also, he be- comes good-  - NOTES

chapters.title: Stanza IX.
chapters.content_preview: Stanza IX.  Guru and Sukra owning quadrants become very in- auspicious. When they occupy the 2nd and 7th houses with such ownership, they become powerful in inflicting certain death to the native. ## Page 17

chapters.title: Sranza X.
chapters.content_preview: Sranza X.  Buda is less malicious than Guru and Sukra and Chundra is less than Buda. Ravi and Chundra do not give evil even when they own the 8th house.  ‘ NOTES,

chapters.title: ‘ NOTES,
chapters.content_preview: ‘ NOTES,  We have seen the principle that good planets owning quadrants are inauspicious. Buda is not a complete benefic. His goodness or badness depends upon his associations. Therefore he comes next in order after Guru and Sukra, Chundra comes after Buda, for even without evil

chapters.title: Sranza XI,
chapters.content_preview: Sranza XI,  Kuja (Mars) does not become good when he owns only the 10th house. He must own the 5th also to become thoroughly good,  NOTES,

chapters.title: Srayza XII.
chapters.content_preview: Srayza XII.  Rahu and Kethu give the samie results as those given by the houses they occupy, the planets they are in con- junction with, and the aspects they are subjected to but with greater strength,  NOTLZS.

chapters.title: Sranza XIII.
chapters.content_preview: Sranza XIII.  If the lords of the Kendras are in conjunction with the lords of the Thrikonas without being associated with the lords of other houses, they become extremely power- ful in producing good results. ## Page 21

chapters.title: Sranza XIV
chapters.content_preview: Sranza XIV  The lords of the Kendras and Thrikonas in con- junetion produce good from the simple fact .of their union even when they are weak otherwise.  NOTES.

chapters.title: Stanza XVIII.
chapters.content_preview: Stanza XVIII.  Evil planets viz. lords of 3rd, 6th, 8th, 11th, and 12th houses, when in conjunction with powerful Rajayoga pla- nets, also produce favourable results in their subperiods according to their own sources of strength at the time.  NOTES.

chapters.title: Stanza XXIII.
chapters.content_preview: Stanza XXIII.  The 2nd house is stronger in inflicting death than the 7th; planets who occupy the 2ndare stronger in killing persons than the lords of the 2nd; those who are in con- junction with the lord of the 2nd are still more powerful in causing death.

chapters.content_preview: Sranza XXIV. chapters.title: Stanza XXVI.
chapters.content_preview: Stanza XXVI.  When the periods of death- inflicting planets are not appearing in time to cause death, the planet most inaus- picious in the horoscope will cause death at any time. ## Page 36  30 JATAKACHUNDRIKA.

chapters.title: Stanza XXVII.
chapters.content_preview: Stanza XXVII.  Sani, inclined to do evil by his conjunction with lords of death houses or those who have any power to inflict death, will cause death in preference to any of those planets.  NOTES.

chapters.content_preview: Sranza: XLII.  But on the other hand Guru when combined with Sani, not only does not give good but will actively produce evil. Sukra does not himself kill the native although he possesses death-inflicting powers. :  NOTES.

chapters.title: Stanza XLIV. Vrishabha-Taurus.
chapters.content_preview: Stanza XLIV. Vrishabha-Taurus.  To the person born in Vrishabha (Taurus) Lagnam, Guru, Sukra and Chundra ere evil planets ; Sani and Ravi are good planets. “Sani alone is capable of giving Raja- yogam to the person born in Vrishabhalagnam.  NOTES. :

chapters.title: NOTES.
chapters.content_preview: NOTES. :  Guru is the lord of 8th and 11th houses both of which: are de- clared bad. chapters.title: Sranza. 76.
chapters.content_preview: Sranza. 76.  Planets, by their becoming good and evil and being bound by well-defined principles, produce good or evil in their own Dasas (periods) and Bhukties (sub-periods).  NOTES.
